features: [High quality hair band]: Elastic bands are very soft with good elastic, easy to stretch, non-toxic, no odor and safe, these soft hair elastics are made from durable and flexible rubber, more durable than regular rubber bands.

[Abundant quantity]: This is a great deal on 1500 pieces mini multicolor rubber elastic hair bands, 1.5 cm in diameter with 1mm in thickness, enough for braiding different hairstyles, To create special & unique hairstyles for your little baby with our mluti-colored elastic bands.

[Multicolor hair bands ]: There are two different types of mini headbands, Two packs of rubber bands are packed separately, one pack of 750 candy colors, one pack of 750 fluorescent colors, total 1500 pcs color rubber elastic hair bands can be used for a long time, good for small dreadlocks, hair design, hair braiding, pony tails, wedding hairstyle, or DIY more charming hairstyle.

[Easy to take]: Mini elastic hair bands are packed in a quality clear plastic bag for storage, easy to store in the office, home or in your bag.Great Gift for your kids. Hair bands are disposable, if you reused, each time, as expected, it gets a bit larger, please don't reuse them once it loose elastics.

[Multi-purpose]: The tiny elastic hair bands are small, stretchy, and perfect for holding braids for various hair types, good for girls different hairstyles, hair design, curls, ponytails, braiding, wedding hairstyle, party.
description: Product Description Hanyousheng mini elastic hair bands are made from durable and flexible rubber, Multi-color hair bands to create beautiful and unique hairstyles for you and your children. Features & Benefits: 1 bag of about 1500 pieces mini multicolor rubber bands, enough for you to DIY different hair styles in a long time. Two styles of color design are used. These hair bands are placed in two different bags, each with 750. There are various color like Red, Pink, Purple, Yellow, Blue, etc. To create special & unique hairstyles for your little baby with our mluti-colored rubber bands. Free 2 clear bags and a self sealing bag, convenient for store, keep the hair ties clean and tidy. Elastic bands are very soft with good elastic. Hair Bands are disposable, if you reused, each time, as expected, it gets a bit larger, please don't reuse them once it loose elastics. Specifications: Material: Rubber Thickness: 1 mm Diameter: 15 mm Color: Multicolor Quantity: 1500 Pieces
